nasb.text: That too would have been an iniquity calling for judgment, For I would have denied God above.

esv.text: this also would be an iniquity to be punished by the judges, for I would have been false to God above.

cnv.text: 那麼這也就是該受審判的罪孽， 因為我欺哄了高高在上的　神。

ccb.text: 就是犯了当受审判的罪恶， 因为这等于我背弃了天上的上帝。
